pages.arrivals_summary: Info vol arive pou afise isi enn fwa sours operasyonel ofisyel konekte.
pages.departures_summary: Info vol depar pou afise isi enn fwa sours operasyonel ofisyel konekte.
pages.flight_status_summary: Tablo statu operasyonel pare pou integrasyon sours ofisyel. Antretan, platfom-la montre enn leta pa konfigire olye data invante.
pages.notices_summary: Lir notis ofisyel ayropor, konsey pasaze, reglaman ek kominike operasyonel aprouve.
pages.no_notices: Pann ankor ena notis pibliye disponib.
pages.faq_summary: Trouv repons rapid pou kestion kouran pasaze lor vol, dokiman, transpor ek asistans ayropor.
pages.directions_desc: Ayropor Plaine Corail li trouv apepre 15 km sid-wes Port Mathurin, anviron 25 minit an vwatir lor simin prinsipal.
pages.no_points: Pann ankor pibliye okenn pwin dintere.
pages.location_error: Pa kapav trouv ou pozision. Aktiv servis lokalizasion.
pages.offline_summary: Bann paz info esansyel ankor aksesib depi kas. Data operasyonel an direk kouma vol ek letan bizin enn koneksyon rezo.
pages.disclaimer_summary: Info legal inportan konsernan litilizasyon sa platfom pasaze-la.
pages.privacy_summary: Kouma Airport of Rodrigues Ltd zer data personel lor sa platfom pasaze-la.
pages.terms_summary: Kondisyon itilizasyon ki gouvern akse platfom info pasaze ayropor.
pages.emergency_summary: Info ofisyel lor kontak irzans ek konsey pasaze pou Ayropor Plaine Corail.
pages.amenities_summary: Info lor boutik, restoran, fasilite ek lot servis disponib dan Ayropor Plaine Corail.
pages.amenities_fallback: Info lor servis pou pibliye isi enn fwa kontenin editoryal konfigire dan sistem zesyon kontenin. Silvouple kontakte ayropor pou info aktyel.
pages.news_summary: Anons ayropor, lartik nouvel ek mizajour evenman.
pages.no_news: Pann ankor pibliye okenn nouvel ou evenman.
pages.news_not_found_desc: Lartik demande pa finn kapav trouve.
pages.airport_project_summary: Mizajour, dokiman ek anons konsern Proze Ayropor Rodrig — nouvo pist ek infrastriktir asosie.
pages.no_airport_project: Pann ankor pibliye okenn mizajour lor proze ayropor.
pages.airport_project_not_found_desc: Mizajour demande pa finn kapav trouve.
pages.notice_not_found_desc: Notis demande pa finn kapav trouve.
pages.page_not_found_desc: Paz demande pa finn kapav trouve.
pages.vip_summary: Fasilite salon exklizif pou pasaze elizib dan Ayropor Plaine Corail.
pages.amenities_not_configured: Info ekipman pou pibliye isi enn fwa konfigire.
pages.useful_links_summary: Bann lien ver lotorite laviasyon, resours vwayaz ek servis lokal pou Lil Rodrig.
pages.duty_free_summary: Boutik duty free, libreri ek konte manze disponib dan Ayropor Plaine Corail.
pages.duty_free_body: Aste duty free disponib pou tou bann pasaze ki pe ale ek ki pe arive. Bann lartik di liks duty free ki sorti depi bann parfum top mark, kosmetik, liker, sokola, ek sigaret ziska ekipman elektronik, divin, ek boukou plis kapav aste a bann pri konpetitif. Pou enn pli bon konfor ek servis pou bann pasaze ki pe arive, boutik duty free larive finn deplase dan enn pli gran lokal ver lafin Desam 2018. Nouvo boutik la ofer enn pli gran swa prodwi avek enn lexperyans aste amelyore. Ler louvertir selon program vol pibliye. Rodrigues Duty Paradise Ltd (RDFP) kapav kontakte pou plis linformasyon.
pages.bookshop_body_1: Libreri Island Books & Clothing sitye dan Zom Datant Depar apre kontrol Imigrasyon ek Sekirite Bagaz Kabinn. Libreri la aksesib zis pou bann pasaze ki pe ale. Libreri la ena enn seri liv, magazinn ek roman an Angle ek an Franse pou tou laz. Liv lor Lil Rodrig kapav aste laba ansam avek bann lartik souvenir.
pages.bookshop_body_2: Bann pasaze ki pe ale kapav osi rafresi zot avek enn bwason so ou fre ek enn ti manze dan libreri la. Sa li sel pwen rafresisan dan Zom Depar. Ler louvertir selon program vol pibliye.
pages.food_counter_body: Bann konte manze disponib dan hol depar ek dan Konkours Piblik (lor letaz anba) pou bann pasaze ek viziter ayropor. Bann konte manze ofer enn gran varyete bwason fre ek so. Repa so, patisri, sandwits ek lezot manze sek osi disponib. Ler louvertir selon program vol pibliye.
pages.home_meta_description: Plaform ofisyel Ayropor Plaine Corail: arive, depar, avi, transpor, aksesibilite ek linformasyon pasaze.
pages.accessibility_summary: Sipor aksesibilite, asistans mobilite redwit ek fasilite aksesib dan Ayropor Plaine Corail.
pages.transport_summary: Linformasyon ofisyel lor transpor, direksyon, depoze, anbarkman ek parking ayropor.
pages.airport_map_summary: Plan interaktif ayropor avek terminal, zom parking, pwen lakse ek zom transpor.
pages.contact_summary: Biro led ofisyel ek detay kontak ayropor.
pages.passenger_guide_summary: Gid preparasyon vwayaz pou bann pasaze ki pe transit par Ayropor Plaine Corail.
